The '''Calipsa Embassy''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], was located in the Historical District of [[Estalle Island]]. It consisted of a large embassy building that befitted its status at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The embassy did not typically host many social functions since leading house nobles tended to prefer to entertain on their private islands on Procopia.
